name: Easter Bunny Check Shower Curtain Pink - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of festive fun to your bath space with this Bunny Tile Easter Shower Curtain from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton, the decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation and is machine washable for a quick refresh whenever needed. It's adorned with a blush pink bunny tile print to beautifully enclose your bathtub or shower stall for enhanced privacy and style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
